title: Close extra findings at done
goal: At the mini done checkpoint, surface open findings as candidates and let the user close additional ones via a repeatable --resolve-finding <id> flag, recording them on the phase so mini undo reopens them symmetrically.

steps.title: Add resolvedFindings field to Phase
steps.detail: In src/state/types.ts add optional resolvedFindings?: string[] to interface Phase — ids of findings closed at the done checkpoint beyond fromFinding. Compiles (tsc) clean; an old state.json without the field loads (field undefined).

steps.title: Resolve & record extra findings in finalize
steps.detail: In finalizePhaseSideEffects (done.ts), after closing fromFinding, close each requested id via resolveFinding, dedupe against fromFinding, tolerate missing/already-resolved (no-op). Write successfully closed ids to phase.resolvedFindings BEFORE the commit so the rewritten findings file lands in it. Covered by a test.

steps.title: Thread option + CLI flag --resolve-finding
steps.detail: ApplyReportOptions.resolveFindings?: string[]; applyDone passes it into finalize. In cli.ts add a repeatable --resolve-finding <id> (commander collector) to the done command. mini done --apply --resolve-finding 167-7 --resolve-finding 167-8 works.

steps.title: Undo reopens recorded extra findings
steps.detail: Extend findingsToReopen (undo.ts) to return cp.resolvedFindings in addition to cp.fromFinding for phases reverting from done. mini undo after a done with extra findings reopens them all. Covered by a test (resolve -> undo -> finding open again).

steps.title: Surface open findings at done checkpoint
steps.detail: buildDoneContext/buildDoneSessionPrompt (context.ts, sessionContext.ts) list open findings (excluding the already-linked fromFinding) as candidates and instruct that, once the user confirms one is fixed, --resolve-finding <id> is appended to mini done --apply. A prompt/snapshot test shows the list.

steps.title: Tests for the full path
steps.detail: Tests: finalize closes + records ids, dedup vs fromFinding (no duplicate), a missing id is a tolerant no-op and is not recorded, undo reopens all extras, the prompt lists candidates. All green.

resolvedVerify: Run an end-to-end checkpoint in a real session

autoCommit.subject: Phase 187: Close extra findings at done
